arts.ttl: Luton v Leeds: Farke has huge XI calls to make
arts.sum: Farke has to buck that trend that Leeds fans know all too well, and included in his task are a few contentious selection headaches that he must get right. Dwelling on the failures of March isn’t going to get Leeds anywhere, but Farke knows that his side has to improve if they want to finish top of the pile.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Willy Gnonto itching to start v Luton
arts.sum: One of those is getting Willy Gnonto into the starting lineup, something that appears a non-negotiable decision after multiple impressive showings off the bench, including what he thought was going to be a winner against Swansea last time out. Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto is fighting for a long-awaited start after a handful of impressive cameos off the bench.

arts.ttl: Karl Darlow selection is not the only big Leeds call Farke must make vs Luton
arts.sum: The big talking point has been on the goalkeeper situation and Illan Meslier - and Daniel Farke has already revealed his selection decision for the weekend. United have won just once in their last five games, which denotes their poorest form this season and at the worst time too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Luton Town with Daniel Farke set to shuffle the pack
arts.sum: Farke revealed at his pre-match press conference that Karl Darlow will replace Illan Meslier in goal for the trip to Kenilworth Road. Sometimes you have to protect a goalkeeper a little bit and this was my feeling this week.
